data.title: Colony Grill to open new location in Glastonbury, CT as part of Hartford County expansion.
data.description: A beloved eatery in southern Connecticut, Colony Grill, which has been serving its Famous Thin-Crust Pizza with signature Hot Oil topping for 90 years, is expanding into Hartford County. The restaurant has confirmed plans to open a new location in Glastonbury, CT later in 2026.

data.title: Cisco launches new Cisco 360 Partner Program for AI era, helping customers reach transformative AI outcomes faster.
data.description: A recently launched program is aiding customers in achieving significant AI progress rapidly. The Cisco 360 Partner Program is now active, aimed at facilitating outcomes that are unique to Cisco and its collaborative network. The program highlights the benefits of partnering with Cisco in the realm of artificial intelligence. This initiative emphasizes the advantages of collaborating with Cisco, showcasing the potential for accelerated AI advancements.

data.title: CATA and Versiti Blood Center of Illinois hold annual blood drive during 2026 Chicago Auto Show at McCormick Place.
data.description: The Chicago Automobile Trade Association (CATA), in collaboration with the Versiti Blood Center of Illinois, is set to organize the Dennis Buckley Memorial Blood Drive at the 2026 Chicago Auto Show from February 7 to 16 at McCormick Place. This event aims to gather blood donations to support those in need.

data.title: Ryanair's Italy fine impacts profits, with Q3 profit at 115 million euros, down from 149 million euros. Revenue rose 9% to 3.21 billion euros, with passenger traffic at 47.5 million. Shares down post earnings report.
data.description: Ryanair Holdings plc reported fiscal third-quarter results with profit after tax of 115 million euros, down from 149 million euros last year, mainly due to an 85 million euros exceptional regulatory charge. Revenue for the quarter rose 9% to 3.21 billion euros, with passenger traffic increasing by 6% to 47.5 million. Although sales beat estimates, earnings of 7 cents per share fell short of the 18-cent forecast. The company noted an average fare increase of 4% to 44 euros and a rise in revenue per passenger by 3%. Operating costs increased by 6% to 3.11 billion euros, with profit after tax at 30 million euros post-exceptionals. The airline emphasized that unit costs remained flat when excluding the exceptional charge. The company is also appealing against what it termed a baseless regulatory fine. Shares of Ryanair were down in early trading as the results missed analyst expectations.

data.title: Real Brokerage to host conference call for Q4 and full year 2025 earnings. Key numbers undisclosed.
data.description: Real Brokerage, based in Miami, will be hosting a conference call to discuss their fourth quarter and full-year earnings for 2025. This event will provide insights into the company's financial performance over the year, including key numbers such as revenue, profit, and growth trends. Shareholders and analysts are encouraged to participate to gain a better understanding of Real Brokerage's financial health and future outlook.

data.title: Dynex Capital, Inc. (NYSE: DX) reported Q4 and full year 2025 results, hosting a call at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
data.description: GLEN ALLEN, Va.-- Dynex Capital, Inc. (NYSE: DX), a Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) known for its consistent dividend generation from top-notch mortgage assets, announced its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. A call will be led by management at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time today for discussing the results and future business prospects. Further information to join the call is available below in the "Earnings Conference Call" section. Key Points: Total economic revenues and other financial highlights will be shared during the call.

data.title: MainStreet Bancshares reported a net income of $15.6 million for 2025. They executed a buyback of 209,000 shares. Net interest margin expanded to 3.46% in 2025. The company increased gross loans by $54 million in the fourth quarter. MainStreet Bank is focused on serving the Washington, DC community and expanding into Middleburg, VA in February 2026. Total assets were $2.21 billion as of December 31, 2025. Total deposits were $1.89 billion, with non-interest bearing deposits at $378.7 million. Stockholders' equity was $218.6 million. Salaries and benefits expenses were $31.6 million for 2025. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: MainStreet Bancshares, Inc. reported a net income of $15.6 million for the year-ended December 31, 2025, with earnings per common share of $1.76. They executed a buyback of 209,000 shares in Q4. The net interest margin expanded to 3.46% in 2025, a 33-basis point increase. The bank increased gross loans by $54 million in the fourth quarter. MainStreet Bank operates six branches and has over 55,000 free ATMs. Their total assets as of December 31, 2025, amounted to $2.21 billion. The company's total deposits were $1.89 billion, and total stockholders' equity was $218.59 million. Additionally, their net interest income for the year was $69.55 million. MainStreet Bank also announced the opening of a new branch in Middleburg, Virginia, in February 2026.

data.title: Millrose Properties reveals tax treatment of 2025 dividends for NYSE: MRP with specific allocations.
data.description: Miami-based company Millrose Properties, Inc. (NYSE: MRP) disclosed the income allocations for its 2025 dividend distributions on common stock. The final allocations, to be reported on Form 1099-DIV, are detailed in the table below:- Class A common stock CUSIP: 601137102- Class B common stock CUSIP: 601137201Further details such as record date, payment date, and specific dividend amounts were not provided in the summary.

data.title: Aimbridge Hospitality enters 2026 with strong momentum, world's largest third-party hotel management company, focused on enhanced hotel performance.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Aimbridge Hospitality, the largest third-party hotel management company globally, is poised for a successful 2026 after making significant strides in the past year. With a commitment to providing tangible benefits for hotel owners, the company has improved its hotel operations, fostered a culture centered on performance, and pursued controlled expansion. Aimbridge's primary focus is on boosting hotel performance through gaining market share and enhancing overall operations.

data.title: Lucend, formerly Coolgradient, raises $3.3M to bring Transparent AI to data centers, enhancing uptime, reliability, and efficiency.
data.description: Lucend recently unveiled its transparent data center optimization service in the U.S., aiming to assist enterprises in navigating intricate operational landscapes. Their platform equips data center operators, innovation officers, and sustainability officers with essential insights to make informed decisions with reliability and assurance. Lucend's Transparent AI technology seamlessly integrates with current infrastructure without the need for additional hardware, effectively converting stagnant systems into dynamic, adaptive solutions.

data.title: Rio2 reports first gold pour at Fenix Gold Mine in Chile on Jan 23, 2026. Mine is 100% owned by Rio2.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Rio2 Limited, trading as RIO on the Toronto Stock Exchange, RIOFF on the OTCQX, and RIO on the BVL, reported the successful inaugural gold pour at its Fenix Gold Mine in Chile. This marks a significant milestone for Rio2 as it signifies the commencement of gold production at Fenix Gold, which is entirely owned by the company. The event took place in Chile and holds importance for the future operations and financial outcomes of Rio2 Limited.

data.title: $750M in long positions liquidated during weekend slide as Bitcoin prices hit $88K amid Japan's financial turmoil.
data.description: A recent surge in crypto liquidations resulted in long positions facing significant losses, amounting to a total of $750 million. This occurred as cryptocurrency prices experienced a decline, dropping towards $88,000. The market turmoil in Japan's financial sector further contributed to the overall instability.

data.title: Dr. Navid Hafez appointed Director of Clinical Research at new LA site at Los Angeles Cancer Network, part of largest oncology practice.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Dr. Hafez is set to head the latest early-phase research site at the Los Angeles Cancer Network, a prominent community-based oncology practice in the U.S. This announcement was made on Jan. 26, 2026. The Los Angeles Cancer Network is recognized as one of the nation's leading and most varied oncology practices. The START Center for Cancer Research ("START") has been identified as the world's largest establishment dedicated to this cause.

data.title: Delta Dental of California offers new resources to help dentists spot patients at risk for heart disease.
data.description: A recent news release announced by Delta Dental of California on Nov 18, 2025, revealed new resources to assist dentists in identifying patients at risk for cardiovascular disease. The company highlighted changes made to improve patient care. These resources aim to enhance early detection of cardiovascular issues, benefiting approximately 10,000 dentists in California. The update provides crucial information to aid in the early diagnosis of dental patients susceptible to heart conditions, underlining the significance of dental professionals in preventative healthcare. The initiative demonstrates Delta Dental's commitment to promoting overall health awareness within the community.

data.title: Mercanis awarded 2025 European Agentic AI Product Leadership by Frost & Sullivan for transforming digital procurement.
data.description: Mercanis has received accolades from Frost & Sullivan for their exceptional product innovation, customer-centric approach, and leadership in AI within the realm of digital procurement throughout Europe. The recognition was announced on January 26, 2026, with the prominent company being awarded the prestigious 2025 European award for their outstanding contributions to the industry.

data.title: Peter Piper Pizza brings back heart-shaped pizza, $1 from each sold goes to Children's Miracle Network in AZ, CA, NM, TX.
data.description: Peter Piper Pizza's heart-shaped pizza promotion is back for the third year in a row, with $1 from each purchase going towards the Children's Miracle Network in Arizona, California, New Mexico, and Texas. Running until March 1, customers can enjoy the special pizza while supporting a good cause. The initiative aims to raise funds to help children in need, with the goal of making a positive impact in these states. Last year, the campaign raised a total of $XX,XXX for the Children's Miracle Network.

data.title: Estrella Galicia 0,0 sponsors MotoGP Grand Prix of Brazil, extending their commitment to sport.
data.description: In A CORUÑA, Spain, on January 26, 2026, Estrella Galicia 0,0 embarks on a new season in the MotoGP World Championship. The company reinforces its dedication to the sport by becoming the title sponsor of the Grand Prix of Brazil. This sponsorship adds to their existing partnerships in the championship, highlighting their ongoing support.

data.title: Aligned Automation sponsors professional golfers Cole Sherwood, Dillon Stewart, and Kaleiya Romero.
data.description: Today, a global professional technology services company, Aligned Automation, disclosed their sponsorship of professional golfers Cole Sherwood and Dillon Stewart. The company is renowned for accelerating excellence via intelligent operations and data-driven solutions, powered by artificial intelligence. The announcement was made in Dallas on Jan. 26, 2026.

data.title: Ruder Finn acquires Missouri Creative, enhancing global brand experience w/ 2D, 3D design expertise. NY, Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: In a move to enhance its capabilities, Ruder Finn's RF Studio53 division has recently acquired Missouri Creative, a UK company specializing in immersive 2D, 3D, and experiential design. This acquisition aims to bolster RF Studio53's global brand platform. Ruder Finn, known as one of the leading independent marketing and communications agencies globally, has positioned itself with this strategic acquisition. The deal, finalized on January 26, 2026, is set to bring together Missouri Creative's specialized design expertise with Ruder Finn's extensive resources, creating new opportunities for growth and innovation in the industry.
